calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition Adjudicating Claim To Property
Off Calendar Apr-01-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Benedetto, via zoom, for Carl Mergenthaler, via zoom, Petitioner; Hermann Mergenthaler, via zoom, Beneficiary.

The court queries counsel as to why the instant petition was not filed on behalf of the grandchildren. Counsel advises that his client is the only heir that live in the USA and offers additional testimony regarding filing the petition on behalf of his client and that the investments accounts managed by Jackson Square Capital are the only assets in US dollars. Counsel reports on the history of the decedent's time living in Mexico and what his intent was regarding distributions. Hermann Mergenthaler advises that his father's grandchildren are his brother Eric's children, and that Eric predeceased his father.

After additional discussion, the Petition Adjudicating Claim to Property is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.
